positive: A mystical, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent forest elements, featuring floating crystal flowers, interwoven glowing vines, and ethereal moths in mid-flight. The style is highly detailed graphic illustration, blending the sharpness of Art Nouveau vector art with the soft glow of deep-sea bioluminescence. Composition must be centered, balanced, and optimized for a repeating apparel print layout. Color palette is dominated by deep indigo, midnight blue, teal, and vibrant electric purple, contrasted by glowing, sharp lime-green and cyan accents. Strong contrast, clean silhouette definition, and subtle negative space are crucial for high-quality transfer printing.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, noisy, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, lowres, grayscale, muted colors, photorealism, solid color backgrounds
